meta.title: Renan Oliveira — Tech Lead & Senior Full Stack Developer
meta.description: I build systems that can't go down: ports running 24/7, stadium gates handling 80k tickets, World Cup-scale campaigns. Tech Lead and senior full stack developer — available for contracts.
meta.blogDescription: Technical articles on mission-critical systems, computer vision, event-driven architecture, and whatever else is holding production together.

hero.lede: Tech Lead and senior full stack developer. Ports running 24/7, stadiums with 80,000 people, World Cup-scale campaigns — when going down is not an option, the code is mine.
hero.uptimeLabel: uptime: renan.exe — {years} years writing code, zero intention of stopping

cases.title: Proof it works
cases.intro: Less "passionate about technology", more production numbers. Four real operations my code keeps — or kept — standing.

arsenal.title: Full stack, all the way down
arsenal.intro: "Full stack" here is not a figure of speech. Versatility is how I deliver systems that don't fall over: if the problem crosses layers, I cross them too.
arsenal.architecture: All of it held together with Clean Architecture, DDD, SOLID and Design Patterns — because 3am heroics look great in movies, not in production.
arsenal.bio: Writing code since 2009. Serving enterprise clients since 2021, and in 2022 I founded Nextech Digital Solutions, where I lead architecture and development for mission-critical operations. Based in Três Rios, Brazil, working worldwide — timezones are a detail, production never sleeps anyway.

blog.title: Things I learned keeping production alive
blog.intro: Technical articles straight from the trenches. No todo-list tutorials.

contact.title: Let's build something that doesn't go down?
contact.intro: Tell me about your project, your team, or your production problem. I reply within 24h — usually much faster, because unread notifications bother me.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Project, context, deadline, challenge — the more detail, the better my answer.
contact.successBody: It landed safely on my side. I'll get back to you within 24h — meanwhile, this site keeps an eye on production for me.
contact.errorGeneric: The send failed — and yes, the irony of a broken form on a website about systems that don't go down is not lost on me. Try again or email me directly.

validation.nameRequired: Hard to start a conversation without a name.
validation.emailInvalid: That email doesn't look valid — mind checking?
validation.messageTooShort: Give me at least 10 characters of context.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js, coffee, and the stubbornness of someone who doesn't accept downtime.
footer.sourceHint: Curious? This site's code is on GitHub.

notFound.title: 404 — this page went down.
notFound.body: The irony is not lost on me: the systems-that-never-go-down guy has a page that doesn't exist. In my defense, this route was never in the SLA.

party.toast: PARTY MODE ACTIVATED 🎉 (↑↑↓↓←→←→BA — you know the classics)
